requirement: Implement MIT's 4-tier privilege system: 40 entity permissions, Role entity, Node inheritance, permission middleware on all endpoints

tasks.title: Role entity + 40 entity permissions + privilege inheritance engine
tasks.description:
Implement the privilege system foundation.

APPEND to types.go:
- Role struct: ID, Name, Permissions []string, Description, CreatedAt — json tags
- 40 permission constants organized by category:
  Instrument: PERM_INSTRUMENT_CREATE, PERM_INSTRUMENT_VIEW, PERM_INSTRUMENT_EDIT, PERM_INSTRUMENT_DELETE, PERM_INSTRUMENT_APPROVE
  Market: PERM_MARKET_MANAGE, PERM_MARKET_HALT, PERM_MARKET_START_DAY, PERM_MARKET_END_DAY
  Order: PERM_ORDER_CREATE, PERM_ORDER_CANCEL, PERM_ORDER_VIEW, PERM_ORDER_AMEND, PERM_ORDER_MASS_CANCEL
  Trade: PERM_TRADE_VIEW, PERM_TRADE_CORRECT, PERM_TRADE_BUST, PERM_TRADE_REINSTATE
  Settlement: PERM_SETTLEMENT_VIEW, PERM_SETTLEMENT_TRIGGER, PERM_SETTLEMENT_APPROVE
  Surveillance: PERM_SURVEILLANCE_VIEW, PERM_SURVEILLANCE_MANAGE, PERM_SURVEILLANCE_INVESTIGATE
  Participant: PERM_PARTICIPANT_CREATE, PERM_PARTICIPANT_VIEW, PERM_PARTICIPANT_EDIT, PERM_PARTICIPANT_SUSPEND
  Reference Data: PERM_REFDATA_VIEW, PERM_REFDATA_EDIT, PERM_REFDATA_APPROVE, PERM_REFDATA_UPLOAD
  Admin: PERM_ADMIN_FULL, PERM_ADMIN_FORCE_LOGOUT, PERM_ADMIN_LOCK_USER, PERM_ADMIN_ANNOUNCEMENTS
  Service Desk: PERM_SERVICEDESK_ORDER, PERM_SERVICEDESK_TRADE, PERM_SERVICEDESK_CANCEL
  System: PERM_SYSTEM_CONFIG, PERM_SYSTEM_AUDIT_VIEW, PERM_SYSTEM_ROLE_MANAGE

APPEND to store.go:
- RoleStore interface: Create, Get, GetByName, List, Update, Delete + InMemory
  Seed 3 default roles: ADMIN (all 40 perms), TRADER (order+trade view perms), VIEWER (view-only perms)

Create src/securities-service/internal/engine/privilege.go:
- PrivilegeEngine struct with roleStore, nodeStore, participantStore
- ResolveEffectivePermissions(participantID string) ([]string, error):
  1. Get participant → get permissions
  2. Get participant's node → walk up node tree collecting permissions
  3. Get participant's role (if role field exists) → get role permissions
  4. Merge all permissions (union, deduplicate)
- HasPermission(participantID, requiredPerm string) (bool, error):
  1. Resolve effective permissions
  2. Check if requiredPerm is in the set
  3. PERM_ADMIN_FULL grants everything

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Permission middleware + role CRUD handlers + gateway
tasks.description:
Wire privilege checking into all endpoints.

Part A — Permission middleware (create src/securities-service/internal/middleware/permission.go):
- PermissionMiddleware(privilegeEngine, requiredPerm string) func(http.Handler) http.Handler
- Extracts participant_id from request context or X-Participant-ID header
- Calls privilegeEngine.HasPermission(participantID, requiredPerm)
- If denied: 403 {error: {code: 'PERMISSION_DENIED', message: 'requires: PERM_XYZ'}}
- If no participant_id: pass through (public endpoint)

Part B — Role CRUD handlers (create handlers_role.go):
- POST /api/v1/securities/roles — create role {name, permissions[]}
- GET /api/v1/securities/roles — list all roles
- GET /api/v1/securities/roles/{id} — get role
- PUT /api/v1/securities/roles/{id} — update permissions
- DELETE /api/v1/securities/roles/{id} — delete
- POST /api/v1/securities/roles/{id}/assign/{participant_id} — assign role to participant

Part C — Wire permission checks to key endpoints (modify server.go):
- Instrument create/edit/delete: require PERM_INSTRUMENT_CREATE/EDIT/DELETE
- Order submit: require PERM_ORDER_CREATE
- Trade correct/bust: require PERM_TRADE_CORRECT/BUST
- Market halt/start day: require PERM_MARKET_HALT/START_DAY
- Settlement trigger: require PERM_SETTLEMENT_TRIGGER
- For MVP: add permission checks to the 10 most critical endpoints, not all 130+

Part D — Update server.go + main.go + gateway routes.

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for privilege system
tasks.description:
Write tests for roles, permissions, privilege inheritance.

1. store_test.go:
- TestRoleStore_CRUD — create, get, list, update, delete
- TestRoleStore_SeededRoles — verify ADMIN/TRADER/VIEWER roles exist

2. engine/privilege_test.go:
- TestResolvePermissions_FromRole — participant with TRADER role → trade permissions
- TestResolvePermissions_FromNode — node has extra permissions → inherited
- TestResolvePermissions_Merged — role + node + participant permissions merged
- TestHasPermission_AdminFull — ADMIN_FULL grants everything
- TestHasPermission_Denied — missing permission → false
- TestHasPermission_UnknownParticipant → error

3. handlers_role_test.go:
- TestCreateRole → 201
- TestListRoles → includes seeded roles
- TestAssignRole → 200

4. middleware/permission_test.go:
- TestPermissionMiddleware_Allowed → next handler called
- TestPermissionMiddleware_Denied → 403
- TestPermissionMiddleware_NoParticipant → pass through

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T3.md
